yesterdayStoryline.headline: Late comeback and shootout drama
yesterdayStoryline.subtitle: Messi inspires Argentina turnaround; Switzerland edge Colombia on penalties to reach quarters.

yesterday.scorers: Y Ibrahim El Hanafi 15' (EGY) · M Zaki Abdelraouf 67' (EGY) · C Romero 79' (ARG) · L Messi 83' (ARG) · E Fernández 90+2' (ARG)

lines: Argentina were two goals down before mounting a dramatic late comeback.
The win sends Argentina into the quarter-finals to face Switzerland.

yesterday.scorers: No goals in 120 minutes (decided on penalties)

lines: A cagey, defensive contest produced few clear chances across 120 minutes.
Switzerland prevailed on penalties, advancing to face Argentina in the quarter-finals.

news.headline: Samsung forecasts 19-fold jump in Q2 operating profit
news.body: Samsung forecast a roughly 19-fold rise in second-quarter operating profit to about 89.4 trillion won. Shares fell and global chip stocks slid as investors questioned whether AI-driven demand is sustainable.

footerNote: All times converted from official kickoffs
